Title:
Authors:
Table:
================================================================================
Byte-by-byte Description of file: table.dat
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
 Bytes Format Units  Label     Explanations
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
  1- 13  A13    ---    id       Source identifier
 15- 18  A4     ---    pid      JWST program ID
 20- 30  F11.7  deg    ra       [189.01/189.41] Right ascension
 32- 41  F10.7  deg    dec      [62.15/62.34] Declination
 43- 48  F6.4   ---    zspec    [6.9/7.28] Systemic spectroscopic redshift
 50- 56  F7.3   ---    magF150W [-99.0/30.19] F150W magnitude
 58- 64  F7.3   ---    muv      [-21.99/-11.69] Absolute UV magnitude
 66- 70  F5.3   ---    muv_lo   [0.04/3.64] Lower 1sigma error on muv
 72- 76  F5.3   ---    muv_hi   [0.04/4.51] Upper 1sigma error on muv
 78- 83  F6.3   ---    logm     [7.04/10.63] log stellar mass [Msun]
 85- 89  F5.3   ---    logm_lo  [0.06/1.01] Lower 1sigma error on logm
 91- 95  F5.3   ---    logm_hi  [0.06/1.09] Upper 1sigma error on logm
 97-102  F6.3   ---    sSFR     [0.11/97.97] Specific SFR, 10 Myr [1/Gyr]
104-109  F6.3   ---    sSFR_lo  [0.11/64.51] Lower 1sigma error on sSFR
111-116  F6.3   ---    sSFR_hi  [0.65/74.56] Upper 1sigma error on sSFR
    118  I1     ---    active   1=shown, 0=commented out in the .tex
                               (spurs/DIVER source)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Notes:
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
